lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear and tear and has major mechanical issues that require attention. It may not be reliable for daily use without repairs.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, chips, or dents. The interior is pristine and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
Mint condition.

Experience automotive perfection with this immaculate, showroom-condition beauty! It has been kept in truly mint condition, preserved flawlessly both inside and out. If you're looking for a vehicle that feels and looks brand new, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in fair overall condition and is being sold with a full disclosure of its current state. Mechanically, the car starts and drives, but it has high mileage and shows signs of age-related wear. The engine runs consistently, though there is a minor oil leak from the valve cover gasket and the suspension is beginning to feel a bit loose over bumps. Cosmetically, the exterior has several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some clear coat peeling on the roof. The interior is functional but the upholstery has some visible staining and the driver's side floor mat is worn through. All basic electronics, including the lights and heater, are operational, but the air conditioning is not blowing as cold as it once did. This car is a decent option for someone looking for affordable transportation who is prepared to handle some ongoing maintenance.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing exactly as it did when it first left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, glass-like finish and absolutely no rock chips, door dings, or scratches. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather seats show no wear or creasing, and it still retains that new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and serviced exclusively by certified technicians on a preventative schedule. This is a rare, collector-grade example that drives perfectly and requires nothing but a new owner who appreciates perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. Featuring a clean service history and a refined interior, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and dependable operation.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold for me. It’s in really solid shape—it runs like a dream and has been super well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!

Available is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 and a 6-speed manual gearbox. This unit maintains its 8,400 RPM redline with linear power delivery and crisp throttle response. The chassis features the M Variable Differential Lock and remains structurally rigid, with recent inspections of the subframe and rod bearings confirming its operational integrity. While the exterior shows minor road-wear patina consistent with a well-driven enthusiast vehicle, the suspension kinematics remain tight and the hydraulic steering rack provides excellent feedback. Equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and updated throttle actuators, this example is optimized for spirited driving and technical performance.
Used vehicle. Reliable performance. Clean interior. Minor surface scratches. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents an excellent balance of performance and comfort. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections such as small stone chips on the hood, which are typical for a well-loved car of this vintage. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved; the upholstery is free of tears or significant wear, and all interior electronics—including the infotainment system and climate control—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular synthetic oil changes. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes were recently serviced to ensure a confident driving experience. It offers a quiet, stable ride with no rattles or unexpected noises, making it a reliable choice for daily commutes or long-distance travel. This is a solid, honest vehicle that has many miles of dependable service left to offer its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with exceptional value. Thoroughly inspected and prepared for immediate service, this unit stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains in commendable condition.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar balances sophisticated performance with exceptional long-term value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a total joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my trips! It is the perfect fit for someone who wants a dependable ride that still looks great cruising down the street. I’ve taken really good care of it, and I just know you’re going to love it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel for a test drive soon!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering 333 hp with a focus on high-revving linear power delivery via individual throttle bodies. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain remains tight with a factory M-Variable differential providing optimal lockup. The chassis is well-sorted, featuring upgraded subframe reinforcement plates to address known structural fatigue points. The VANOS system has been serviced for precise valve timing, and the rod bearings were replaced as preventative maintenance. Suspension geometry remains true
Good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Reliable daily driver. Title in hand.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a balanced blend of performance and comfort, representing a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor signs of careful use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring premium upholstery that has been preserved with care. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine pulls strongly, the transmission shifts smoothly, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—function exactly as they should. It has a comprehensive service history, recently underwent a full fluid flush, and sits on tires with plenty of tread remaining. This is a reliable, attractive car that is ready for the road today.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-appointed cabin, it balances mechanical excellence with sophisticated styling. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Experience a refined driving dynamic and proven longevity at a highly competitive price point.

This vehicle presents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of refined performance and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and subject to a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits the mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal expected of a premium pre-owned offering. We invite you to experience a vehicle that stands as a testament to disciplined ownership and enduring quality.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline through eight individual throttle bodies. Mated to a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock, the drivetrain provides exceptional corner-exit traction and mechanical engagement. The chassis remains taut, utilizing its original aluminum multi-link suspension geometry and Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adjustable damping rates. Recent service includes a comprehensive fluid analysis and cooling system pressure test. While showing minor aesthetic wear consistent with its age, the high-revving powertrain and structural integrity are excellent, offering a pure analog driving experience with modern refinement.
Used vehicle in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well. Title in hand.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and stands as a testament to responsible ownership. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, superficial character marks consistent with careful use. Step inside to a smoke-free cabin where the premium leather seating remains supple and well-conditioned, and all technological features—including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control—operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a recent full-synthetic oil change and a comprehensive brake inspection just completed. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are seamless, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. Included are two sets of keys and a detailed folder of service records, offering the next owner total peace of mind in a high-quality, reliable package.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. A refined choice for those who demand long-term reliability and sophisticated presentation.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a thorough multi-point inspection, this automobile demonstrates consistent mechanical reliability and a refined interior aesthetic. It represents a distinguished opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a fantastic car for me. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily errands and weekend trips. It’s got that 'just right' feel—well-loved, well-maintained, and totally ready to hit the road with its next owner. I’ve taken great care of it, so you’re getting a total gem that still looks and drives great. Come take it for a spin, I just know you’re going to love it!

Power is delivered through a tactile 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a Variable M Differential Lock. The chassis dynamics remain sharp, with a reinforced subframe and updated control arm bushings providing
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality, presenting in well-maintained condition that reflects consistent care. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, and while you might find the occasional minor stone chip consistent with careful road use, the bodywork remains straight and attractive. Inside, the cabin is a testament to the car's history; the upholstery is clean and free of tears, the carpets have been protected by floor mats, and all electronic features—including the infotainment system and climate control—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a responsive engine and a transmission that shifts smoothly through every gear. It has been serviced regularly, with recent maintenance including a fresh oil change and a comprehensive safety inspection. With plenty of tread left on the tires and a solid service history, this car offers a reliable and premium driving experience for its next owner.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience consistent with our dealership's standards of integrity. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking proven reliability and an authoritative road presence.
